KOB.Name: Name
KOB.DropTropeHint: Drag a Trope from the compendium onto this sheet.
KOB.ApplyTropeStats: Apply this Trope's suggested stat dice to the character?
KOB.TakesTheLoss: {name} takes the loss and gains an adversity token.
KOB.SpendPE: Psychic Energy tokens to spend (+1 each, {pe} available):
KOB.Settings.UseBikes.Name: Use Bikes
KOB.Settings.UseBikes.Hint: Enable the bike subsystem (color + upgrade). When off, bike fields are hidden on character sheets and the creation wizard skips the Bike step.
KOB.Bike.ColorEffect.gold: After a stunt, +3 Charm against anyone who saw it.
KOB.Bike.ColorEffect.gray: Never get lost in areas you know.
KOB.Bike.ColorEffect.orange: On a success, give one ally an Adversity token.
KOB.Bike.ColorEffect.purple: Treat Snap Decisions as Planned Actions.
KOB.Bike.ColorEffect.red: Each Adversity token you spend adds +1 more.
KOB.Bike.UpgradeEffect.banana-seat: Carry a passenger; a Powered passenger regains up to 2 PT per day (not above their starting amount).
KOB.Bike.UpgradeEffect.basket: Once per day, produce a commonplace item from it.
KOB.Bike.UpgradeEffect.bell: Narrate a helpful ring to give an ally +1 on their check.
KOB.Bike.UpgradeEffect.first-aid-kit: Once per day, help an ally recover from an injury (GM's discretion).
KOB.Bike.UpgradeEffect.milk-crate: Carry one large item (explain how it's rigged to haul it).
KOB.Bike.UpgradeEffect.pegs: Carry a passenger; they also gain your bike color's bonus.
KOB.Bike.UpgradeEffect.tassels: +1 to all checks while being chased.
KOB.Bike.UpgradeEffect.ten-speeder: Add a d4 to Flight checks, but -1 to Brawn and Grit until you catch your breath.
KOB.Creator.Title: Build a Kid
KOB.Creator.TropeHint: Pick an archetype to prefill stat dice, or build from scratch.
KOB.Creator.StatsHint: Use each die (d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20) exactly once. Boosted stats show +1 from your age.
KOB.Creator.DupWarn: Each die may be used only once — resolve duplicates to continue.
KOB.Creator.BikeHint: Pick a color and an upgrade — each grants a bonus while riding.
KOB.Creator.BackpackHint:
Flashlight
Walkie-talkie
Best friend's phone number
KOB.Creator.AgeStrengthMissing: Couldn't find the age strength "{slug}" in the Strengths compendium — add it manually.
KOB.RolledOnePrompt: The die came up 1. Take an Adversity token?
KOB.NoAssignedCharacter: Assign a character to your user (right-click your name in the Players list) to spend Adversity.
KOB.NoActiveGM: No GM is connected to apply the token.
KOB.SpendFailed: Couldn't apply the token — it was refunded.
KOB.SheetPowered: Kids on Bikes Powered Character Sheet
